state.next-action: 2026-04-18: Project externalized from custom_portfolio monorepo. REQUIREMENTS.xml captures the existing shape (CLI, reader, planning-pack, watch). Next: (a) write ROADMAP.xml phase 01 "standalone-ready" — CI workflow, tagged release story, consumer-install verification against magicborn projects; (b) push this branch to MagicbornStudios/repub-builder upstream; (c) track portfolio-side removal under get-anything-done TASK "Remove vendor/repub-builder submodule".
